title: Directions — Monologue
description: Listen, then prove you were listening

_voiceScript.script:
Omar: Marek, mám list na pošte. Musím tam ísť.
Marek: Odkiaľ vieš?
Omar: Dostali sme upozornenie. Čakajú ma tam.
Omar: Zavolám si taxi.
Marek: Taxi? Pošta je tu blízko! Päť minút pešo.
Omar: Vážne? Neviem kde je.
Marek: Choďte priamo po tejto ulici.
Omar: Po tejto ulici?
Marek: Áno. Na prvej križovatke odbočte vpravo.
Omar: Vpravo pri semaforoch?
Marek: Presne. Potom choďte rovno. Pošta je oproti parku, vedľa banky.
Omar: Oproti parku, vedľa banky. Dobre.
Marek: Nemôžete sa minúť. Je to veľká budova.
Omar: Ďakujem. Idem hneď!
Marek: Dobrú cestu!

exercises.instruction: Tap every word or expression you heard in the conversation.

questions.questionEn: Marek tells Omar the post office is nearby. What does Marek say?
questions.answerMeaning: Pošta je tu blízko! = The post office is close by! Blízko = close/nearby.

reviewPair.english: The post office is close by.

questions.questionEn: Omar repeats Marek's directions to confirm. What does Omar say?
questions.answerMeaning: Oproti parku, vedľa banky. = Opposite the park, next to the bank. Oproti = opposite, vedľa = next to.

reviewPair.english: opposite the park, next to the bank

questions.questionEn: Why does Omar want to call a taxi?

answers.textEn: Because the post office is too far to walk
Because he does not know where the post office is

questions.answerMeaning: Omar says Vážne? Neviem kde je. = Really? I don't know where it is. He wanted a taxi because he didn't know the way.

reviewPair.english: I don't know where it is.

questions.questionEn: At the first junction, which way does Marek tell Omar to turn?
questions.answerMeaning: Na prvej križovatke odbočte vpravo. = At the first junction turn right. Vpravo = right.

reviewPair.english: At the first junction turn right.

questions.questionEn: Where exactly is the post office?

answers.textEn: Opposite the station, next to the supermarket
Opposite the park, next to the bank
Opposite the school, next to the pharmacy

questions.answerMeaning: Pošta je oproti parku, vedľa banky. = The post office is opposite the park, next to the bank.

reviewPair.slovak: Pošta je oproti parku, vedľa banky.
reviewPair.english: The post office is opposite the park, next to the bank.

questions.questionEn: How does Marek reassure Omar he won't get lost?

answers.textEn: He says it has a big sign outside
He says it is the only yellow building
He says you cannot miss it — it is a big building

questions.answerMeaning: Nemôžete sa minúť. Je to veľká budova. = You cannot miss it. It is a big building.

sentences.promptEn: I have a letter at the post office.
The post office is close by. Five minutes on foot.
At the first junction turn right.
The post office is opposite the park, next to the bank.
You cannot miss it. It is a big building.
